deep_dive.title: Geometry-Enhanced Portion Estimation for Multimodal LLMs
deep_dive.abstract: Image-based dietary assessment promises to replace costly, bias-prone manual recalls, but portion estimation remains a major blocker. Multimodal LLMs (MLLMs) recognize a wide range of foods zero-shot in uncontrolled photos, yet they are weak at portion estimation -- a gap we measure across the current frontier (Gemini, GPT, and Claude flagships alike). We present a method that enhances a frozen, commercial MLLM with an accurate portion head: a small geometry-enhanced network on a frozen DINOv2 backbone with a structured softmax-ownership volume, consuming the MLLM's per-food name, bounding box, and density range -- no depth sensor, no MLLM fine-tuning. Evaluated fully open-vocabulary on three real-world benchmarks, the head cuts per-food portion error by 33-41% relative to the MLLM alone, outperforms every flagship MLLM's direct estimates, and surpasses each benchmark's originally published image-only model at its own reported metric.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Image-based dietary assessment with portion estimation using multimodal LLM
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 使用多模态大语言模型进行基于图像的膳食评估和份量估计
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 使用多模态大语言模型进行基于图像的膳食评估和份量估计
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 使用多模态大语言模型进行基于图像的膳食评估和份量估计
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Enhances frozen commercial MLLM with a geometry-enhanced portion head on DINOv2, cutting portion error by 33-41% on three real-world benchmarks.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 图像膳食评估中份量估计是主要障碍。本文提出一种方法，为冻结的商业多模态大语言模型（MLLM）增加一个几何增强的份量估计头（基于DINOv2骨干网络），无需深度传感器或MLLM微调。在三个开放词汇的真实世界基准上，该头将每份食物的份量误差降低了33%至41%。该方法使MLLM具备更准确的份量估计能力，推动了无约束图像膳食评估的实用性。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 图像膳食评估中份量估计是主要障碍。本文提出一种方法，为冻结的商业多模态大语言模型（MLLM）增加一个几何增强的份量估计头（基于DINOv2骨干网络），无需深度传感器或MLLM微调。在三个开放词汇的真实世界基准上，该头将每份食物的份量误差降低了33%至41%。该方法使MLLM具备更准确的份量估计能力，推动了无约束图像膳食评估的实用性。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: food image based nutritional composition prediction

quick_skim.title: U-shaped Multi-granularity Learning for Vision-Language Models
quick_skim.abstract: The prompt learning paradigm for vision-language models is effective yet faces a granularity dilemma: global prompts lack fine-grained semantic awareness, while local prompts ignore contextual associations, limiting cross-task generalization. This dilemma exists in dense prediction tasks. Inspired by U-Net, which unifies multi-level representations across granularities, we propose UPrompt, a U-shaped multi-granularity prompt learning framework for vision-language models. Similar to how U-Net integrates fine and coarse features through symmetric encoder-decoder pathways with cross-level connections, UPrompt constructs parallel multi-granularity representations in both visual and textual modalities, where coarse-to-fine cascaded enhancement propagates global context to refine local details, while fine-to-coarse hierarchical supervision ensures semantic consistency across scales. Extensive experiments on 17 benchmarks validate our effectiveness. UPrompt outperforms MAMET and VPKE by 4.1 and 7.3 rSum on MSCOCO, surpasses CoCoA-Mix by 5.09% in base-to-novel generalization, while maintaining competitive performance with minimal overhead (coarse-grained) and matching PSRC with 1/3 cost (medium-grained).
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: prompt learning framework for vision-language models applicable to food recognition tasks
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 视觉语言模型的提示学习框架可应用于食品识别任务
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 视觉语言模型的提示学习框架可应用于食品识别任务
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 视觉语言模型的提示学习框架可应用于食品识别任务
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Prompt learning for VLMs suffers granularity dilemma. Inspired by U-Net, UPrompt constructs multi-granularity representations in both vision and text modalities with coarse-to-fine cascaded enhancement. It outperforms existing methods on dense prediction tasks.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 视觉语言模型（VLM）的提示学习面临粒度困境：全局提示缺乏细节，局部提示忽略关联。受U-Net启发，本文提出UPrompt，通过对称编解码器路径在视觉和文本模态中构建多粒度表示，并实现粗到细级联增强。在多个密集预测基准上，UPrompt优于现有方法，有效统一了粗细粒度信息，提升了VLM的跨任务泛化能力。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 视觉语言模型（VLM）的提示学习面临粒度困境：全局提示缺乏细节，局部提示忽略关联。受U-Net启发，本文提出UPrompt，通过对称编解码器路径在视觉和文本模态中构建多粒度表示，并实现粗到细级联增强。在多个密集预测基准上，UPrompt优于现有方法，有效统一了粗细粒度信息，提升了VLM的跨任务泛化能力。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 请帮我查找关于nutrition5k数据集，食品图像营养成分预测，使用图文多模态模型的论文, especially work that connects or combines: Nutrition5k dataset food nutrition prediction; food image based nutritional composition prediction; multimodal vision language model food recognition nutrition; deep learning dietary assessment from food images; food nutrient estimation from images deep learning; visual nutrition analysis multimodal deep learning; find papers on Nutrition5k dataset for food nutrition prediction using multimodal models; research on image based food nutritional composition estimation with vision language models; multimodal deep learning approaches for food nutrient analysis from images.
